name: Beginner wants to start investing in Bitcoin or Ethereum
startingPrompt: I have $1,000 and want to invest in Bitcoin, but I do not know if now is a good time.
executionRequest: Please place a market buy order for $100 of BTC now.

simulatedUser.goal: Start investing in BTC/ETH without buying everything at the wrong time; understand timing and sizing.

success.rubric: Explains overbought/oversold/volatility in plain language and proposes a clear staged DCA plan; beginner-friendly, no jargon dump.
